topic: Breast cancer genes: how lifestyle changes turn them off
caption: Did you know that certain lifestyle changes can help turn off breast cancer genes? 🌟 Learn how to reduce your risk with these science-backed tips. 💡 From diet to exercise, we've got you covered. 🏋️‍♀️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏 #breastcancerawareness #genetichealth #lifestylemedicine #cancerprevention #healthyliving #wellness
